title: Automations: Archiving Groups

posts.author: skyline (Project Manager)
posts.cookedHtml:
An Automation needs to be created, or the ability to create custom-Automation, as such:
When all Items (or specified Item) in a Group status changes to Done, then Archive the Group.

Currently, you can Automate the archiving of an Item, but not a Group of Items. I am currently managing phases by Items in a Group. Even if I created a “Completed” Group, then used Automations to move Items to that Group, there is no way to tell which Group the Item originally came from.

posts.author: Krishele (Krishele Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: There is this (below) automation, which you could set up to notify you and then you could archive the group manually.

posts.author: skyline (Project Manager)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! Decent workaround for the time being.

posts.author: Chilenito22 (Danny Avila)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates to this? Really keen to get this automated

posts.author: Judith_B (Judith Baele)
posts.cookedHtml: Good to know, but you would have to set up an automation for every single group in every single board. In my case this would be close to 100… But it is a good tip anyway, thanks
